# Session — 2026-05-09

Reliability review session for the doc ingest pipeline. Reviewed metrics across all active components; no new architectural decisions made. Existing memory accurately reflects current state.

## What happened

### Pipeline reliability review

Pulled audit log stats for the past 30 days via Audit Log MCP. Findings:

- Doc Ingest Pipeline: 99.2% success rate. One failure cluster on 2026-04-28 (Drive quota exhaustion, resolved).
- Batch Runner / Batch Scheduler v2: running clean. No missed windows in 30 days.
- Classification Model: accuracy holding at 98.1% on live traffic (slight dip from 98.2% test corpus — within noise).
- Confidence Scorer: 94% of docs routing to high or med confidence. 6% to review queue — within expected range.
- QBO Sync Worker: 100% success on all invoice pushes. No OAuth token refresh failures.
- Drive Archive Worker: one failure cluster matching the Drive quota event above. Cleared.
- Airtable Sync Worker: stable. No upsert key conflicts.

### Schema Validator CLI

Ran a spot-check of Schema Validator CLI against the current schema registry. All 62 tests still passing after the Pydantic v2 migration (completed last month). No schema drift detected.

### Review Queue backlog

Current backlog: 14 docs pending human review. Consistent with prior weeks. No spike.
